description: Back at S.H.I.E.L.D., Dr. Benson presents Mack with footage recovered from Tinker's lens, revealing catastrophic scenes of a devastated world. He surmises that Sarge's team may have destroyed their origin world. Mack and Benson realize they face a threat beyond their understanding.

transcript.line: This one's not for me. I thought you might need it after you see this. Now, I finally cracked that chip we found on the concrete guy. It's a biological hard drive. Speaking of painful memories.
Yeah, but that's not the alarming part.
End of the line! Let's get out while we still can!
Wherever these people came from, I think they destroyed it.
